category_sources: source_facts.description says Neko is a high-level dynamically typed programming language; official GitHub README identifies it as the Neko Virtual Machine.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README uses Neko and Neko Virtual Machine; source_facts.name is neko.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official NekoVM site; official GitHub README points users to nekovm.org and contains build/configuration documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has official repository https://github.com/HaxeFoundation/neko, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies a dynamically typed programming language; official GitHub README identifies the Neko Virtual Machine and GitHub topics include interpreter and virtual-machine.
